response.overview: It tells the story of Aileen (Anna Jobling), a woman who believes that love and faithfulness to her husband is the key to "Paradise". She is united with Farid (Amir Ahnaf), who is portrayed as the perfect husband in terms of religion and worldly responsibility, but has begun to reveal his hidden identity behind his good character. Farid's evil behavior transforms their married life into a "hell" and brings more obstacles and challenges to her after she discovers the dark side of her husband's involvement with a group called the 'Alpha Male Society'.
response.title: Syurga Itu Bukan Mudah
